zh.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾奧可福德
zh.Charlton on Otmoor, Bicester, Oxfordshir: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾哈爾頓--特姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Poure於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾哈爾頓--特姆爾時，他的父親Walter Poure44歲，母親Matilda40歲。他於大約1205年與Katherine De Cherlton在英國英格蘭奧可福爾哈爾頓--特姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年之前在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Poure于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾哈爾頓--特姆爾时，他的父亲Walter Poure44岁，母亲Matilda40岁。他于大约1205年与Katherine De Cherlton在英国英格兰奧可福爾哈爾頓--特姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年之前在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Poure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Power  .

variants.name: Power
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): ethnic or habitational name from Old French Pohier, Poer, Middle English Po(u)er, Power ‘native of the Pays de Poix’ (Picardy). This is one of the most common surnames in Ireland.
English: nickname for a poor man, or ironically for a miser, from Middle English povre, poure ‘poor’ (from Latin pauper). Compare Poor .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Poure was born about 1180, in Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Poure, was 44 and his mother, Matilda, was 40. He married Katherine De Cherlton about 1205, in Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1219, in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Poure est né environ 1180, à Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Poure, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Katherine De Cherlton environ 1205, à Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1219, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Poure um 1180 in Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Poure 44 und seine Mutter Matilda 40. Er hat um 1205 in Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine De Cherlton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1219 in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Poure è nato il circa 1180 nel Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Poure, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Katherine De Cherlton circa 1205, nel Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1219, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Poureが約1180年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャールトン-オン-オトモオルで生まれた時，父Walter Poureは44歳，母Matildaは40歳であった。約1205年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャールトン-オン-オトモオルでKatherine De Cherltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年以前にイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Poure(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 찰토--트모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Poure(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 찰토--트모어에서 Katherine De Cherlton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Poure nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Poure, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Matilda, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine De Cherlton aproximadamente 1205, em Charlton-on-Otmoor, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1219, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Poure родился около 1180 г. в местности чарлтон-он-отмур, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Poure было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine De Cherlton около 1205 г. в местности чарлтон-он-отмур, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1219 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
